overview: I tested Anthropic's advisor tool on my SAFe Feature Spec System, deployed v3 to Streamlit Cloud with PostgreSQL and governance wiring. The advisor averaged -2.2 points at 4.3× cost ($4.98 vs $1.17) — the data said no.

keyPoints.title: Advisor tool averaged -2.2 pts at 4.3× the cost
Governance modules were built but disconnected until now
Connector abstraction replaced a brittle single-tool Notion integration
PostgreSQL migration unlocked Streamlit Cloud deployment
Live run scored 76→85, $0.72, 27 calls across 5 agents
